blocks.en: Above the radio sits the MAC (Medium Access Control) layer. Its job is to take a chunk of data from the network stack and get it across the air to the right device — handling who may talk, addressing, and acknowledgements.
blocks.zh: 无线电之上是 MAC（介质访问控制）层。它的职责是从网络协议栈取出一段数据，并将其通过空口送达正确的设备——管理谁可以发送、地址，以及确认。

blocks.en: The MAC offers a best-effort delivery service for data units (MSDUs). It does not promise delivery — it promises to try, to retransmit on failure, and to tell the radio how to take its turn.
blocks.zh: MAC 为数据单元（MSDU）提供尽力而为的传输服务。它不保证送达——它保证“尝试”、失败时重传，并告诉无线电如何轮到自己发送。

blocks.en: Two roles matter most: the access point (AP) that coordinates a network, and the station (STA) — your phone or laptop — that joins it. Every device has a 48-bit MAC address; frames carry these addresses so the right receiver picks them up.
blocks.zh: 两个角色最为关键：协调网络的接入点（AP），以及加入网络的站点（STA）——你的手机或笔记本。每台设备都有一个 48 位 MAC 地址；帧携带这些地址，使正确的接收方能够接收。

blocks.en: Wi-Fi frames come in three categories. Management frames set up and maintain the link (beacons that advertise a network, and the join handshake). Control frames are tiny coordinators — the acknowledgement (ACK) is one. Data frames carry your actual payload.
blocks.zh: Wi-Fi 帧分为三类。管理帧用于建立与维护链路（通告网络的信标，以及加入握手）。控制帧是微小的协调者——确认帧（ACK）就是其一。数据帧承载你真正的载荷。

blocks.en:
sequenceDiagram
  participant STA
  participant AP
  STA->>AP: Data frame (MSDU)
  AP-->>STA: ACK
blocks.zh:
sequenceDiagram
  participant STA as 站点 STA
  participant AP
  STA->>AP: 数据帧 (MSDU)
  AP-->>STA: ACK 确认

blocks.en: A unicast data frame is normally answered by an ACK a tiny fixed gap later. No ACK means ‘assume lost, try again’. This simple promise — try, acknowledge, retry — is what makes Wi-Fi feel reliable over an unreliable medium.
blocks.zh: 单播数据帧通常会在一个极短的固定间隔后被一个 ACK 回应。没有 ACK 就意味着“当作丢失，重试”。正是这个朴素的约定——尝试、确认、重传——让 Wi-Fi 在不可靠的介质上显得可靠。

summary.en: Where this lives in the standard

blocks.en: Clause 5 defines the MAC service: the MA-UNITDATA primitives, priority and service-class parameters, and the MAC data service architecture that maps an MSDU onto frames.
blocks.zh: 标准第 5 章定义了 MAC 服务：MA-UNITDATA 原语、优先级与服务类别参数，以及把一个 MSDU 映射到帧上的 MAC 数据服务体系结构。
